prestazioni: Honda HR-35TT (3.5L twin-turbo V6) engine: Replace the OEM Garrett MGT2259S turbos with Precision Turbo & Engine PT6266 CEA billet wheel turbos (62mm inducer, 66mm exducer) paired with a custom 4-ply silicone charge pipe system from Vibrant Performance (3.5" diameter, 90-degree mandrel bends) to eliminate boost leaks under sustained 2.5-bar pressure in GT3 endurance races.

Motec M150 ECU with NSX GT3-specific firmware (v22.3.4) recalibrated for E85 fuel blend (60% ethanol) with custom ignition timing maps (12.5:1 AFR target at 7,500 RPM) and launch control strategy optimized for Pirelli P Zero DHE 30/68-18 front and 31/71-18 rear tires on a carbon-fiber monocoque chassis.

Penske 8760 3-way adjustable coilovers with spherical bearing top mounts (2.5" ID, 14-position rebound, 24-position compression) and custom valving for the NSX GT3 EVO22’s aluminum-intensive front double-wishbone and rear multi-link suspension, paired with a 30mm front sway bar (hollow, 4130 chromoly) from Hyperco to reduce understeer in high-speed S-turns like Suzuka’s 130R.
estetica: Full-carbon fiber GT3 EVO22 aero package from STILLEN, including a 2,000mm-wide front splitter with 12mm dive planes (adjustable via quick-release Dzus fasteners) and a 1,800mm-wide rear diffuser with integrated Gurney flap (30mm height) for +1,200 lbs of downforce at 180 mph, all coated in 3M Matte Carbon Fiber Wrap (2080 series).

OMP Carbon-Kevlar GT3 racing seats (HANS-compatible, FIA 8862-2009 certified) with custom Alcantara suede upholstery (Alcantara Milano, 1.2mm thickness) and embroidered NSX GT3 EVO22 logos (PMS 186C red) on the headrests, paired with a Schroth 6-point harness (ASM2, 3" wide, pull-down adjusters) for driver restraint.

Custom livery design by Driven Artworks featuring a "Digital Camo" motif (hexagonal pixel pattern) in PPG Deltron DBC9700 basecoat with a high-gloss clearcoat (PPG Concept DCU2041) and sponsor decals (e.g., Hankook Ventus Race, Brembo Racing) applied via 3M 1080 vinyl (matte black, cut via CNC plotter for precision edges).
